subcodes.first_line: Hearken thou unto My call from the direction of the Throne: Verily, there is no God but Him, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. Know thou that they have cast Us forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع ندائی عن جهه العرش انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم فاعلم قد اخرجونا
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @suffering and imprisonment
